section.title: Project Costs (Full Detail)
section.content:
Total budget: $1.00 Total spent: $0.00 Budget remaining: $1.00 Spent: 0.0%
### Per-Task Costs
* t0001_brainstorm_results_1: $0.00 * t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models: $0.00 * t0003_simulator_library_survey: $0.00 * t0004_generate_target_tuning_curve: $0.00 * t0005_download_dsgc_morphology: $0.00 * t0006_brainstorm_results_2: $0.00 * t0007_install_neuron_netpyne: $0.00 * t0008_port_modeldb_189347: $0.00 * t0009_calibrate_dendritic_diameters: $0.00 * t0012_tuning_curve_scoring_loss_library: $0.00 * t0014_brainstorm_results_3: $0.00 * t0015_literature_survey_cable_theory: $0.00 * t0016_literature_survey_dendritic_computation: $0.00 * t0017_literature_survey_patch_clamp: $0.00 * t0018_literature_survey_synaptic_integration: $0.00
